articles.description: BJP Tamil Nadu chief Nainar Nagenthran denies any hitch in the seat-sharing talks with ally AIADMK ahead of the April 23 Assembly polls and said the number of constituencies will be finalised soon.

topStories.title: Brent crude spikes above $115/bbl after attacks on Mideast energy assets multiply
topStories.description: Oil prices saw a sharp rise Thursday. Brent crude reached over $115 a barrel. This followed Iran's attacks on energy facilities across the Middle East. Israel had previously struck Iran's South Pars gas field. These events mark a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict. The U.S. Federal Reserve maintained steady interest rates.

topStories.title: Supreme Court seeks fresh HC hearing after convict flags unfair 20-year bail and reduced prison term
topStories.description: Supreme Court says the case is one of “give him an inch and he will ask for a mile”

topStories.title: Iran war: What’s the Jones Act, and why has Trump suspended it for 60 days?
topStories.description: The move allows foreign-flagged vessels to transport goods between US ports for the next 60 days.

topStories.title: US weighs sending thousands of troops to region as Iran war rages: Report
topStories.description: The deployments could help provide Trump with additional options but would further entrench US in a foreign war.

topStories.title: Assam polls: BJP releases list of 88 nominees; ex-Cong leaders among contestants
topStories.description: Veteran lawmaker Atul Bora, who has been denied a ticket, said he could contest as an independent or support the Congress candidate from Dispur

topStories.title: Big relief for Big Boss winner Elvish Yadav as SC quashes proceedings
topStories.description: Supreme Court vs Elvish Yadav: The apex court has given verdict in case against the Youtuber Elvish Yadav. Find out what the court said and the details of the case in which he was chargesheeted.

topStories.title: Assam polls: BJP releases first list of 88 candidates, CM Sarma to contest from Jalukbari
topStories.description: According to the list, Bhupen Kumar Borah, who also joined the BJP recently after leaving the Congress, will contest from Bihpura seat.

topStories.title: Trump attempts to distance US from Israeli strikes on key Iranian gasfield
topStories.description: Questions raised over US knowledge of Israeli plans to attack key Iranian gasfield as energy sites become targets.

topStories.title: Assam polls: Son quits as Congress candidate after Pradyut Bordoloi joins BJP
topStories.description: Prateek Bordoloi, the Congress’s candidate from Margherita, expressed faith in the Congress’s ideals, and said he will continue to work for it

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 20 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: The Iran war enters day 20 as Israeli and Iranian attacks hit energy infrastructure across region.

topStories.title: BJP fields new joinee Pradyut Bordoloi from Dispur, CM Himanta from Jalukbari in first Assam election candidate list
topStories.description: Bordoloi, MP from Nagaon, on Wednesday joined the BJP in the presence of chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma, a day after resigning from the Congress.

topStories.title: US intelligence agencies not expecting China to invade Taiwan in 2027
topStories.description: US spy agencies says Chinese leadership still prefers to pursue unification with Taiwan 'without use of force'.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Robert Arnott as stock market bleeds: ‘What is comfortable is rarely…’
dailyNews.description: Robert Arnott's quote reminds us that the “gut feeling” telling you to run away from a crashing market is often the very thing standing between you and significant wealth.

dailyNews.title: Class 10 scores to be based on avg of best from exams taken in West Asia: CBSE
dailyNews.description: CBSE exams from March 1 were cancelled in West Asia due to the regional conflict the US-Israeli attack on Iran sparked last month

dailyNews.title: JD Vance deflects gas price concerns with criticism of Biden
dailyNews.description: US Vice President JD Vance deflected concerns about high gas prices by criticising the Biden administration.

dailyNews.title: Drones spotted over base where Marco Rubio & Pete Hegseth live, raising fears of Iranian threat: WaPo reports
dailyNews.description: Multiple unidentified drones were spotted over a Washington military base housing two of America's most senior cabinet officials, as the United States operates on heightened alert amid its ongoing strikes against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tehran rescue workers pull survivors from rubble
dailyNews.description: Video released by Iran's Red Crescent shows emergency services rescuing survivors of US-Israeli strikes on Tehran.

dailyNews.title: NYPD officer assigned to Mayor Mamdani’s security suspended after off-duty shooting
dailyNews.description: A New York City police officer allegedly shot a man in the head while off-duty in the Bronx and has been suspended without pay as the department investigates.

dailyNews.title: Trump continues to push for release of Tina Peters as Colorado governor weighs clemency
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump continues to pressure Colorado's governor to free Tina Peters, who is serving a nine-year sentence for a security breach of voting systems.

dailyNews.title: Colorado school staffer accused of sexually abusing 13-year-old student, now on the run
dailyNews.description: A Colorado school staffer allegedly abused a 13-year-old student for months. She is now on the run, facing 12 felony charges including sexual assault on a child.

dailyNews.title: State Department to ask for bonds of up to $15,000 for visa applications from a dozen more countries
dailyNews.description: The State Department expanded visa bond requirements to 12 more countries, whose citizens must post up to $15,000 bonds before traveling to the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Joseph Duggar arrested for allegedly molesting 9-year-old girl during Florida vacation
dailyNews.description: The former "19 Kids and Counting" star was arrested and charged this week with allegedly molesting a 9-year-old girl during a 2020 Florida vacation.

dailyNews.title: LSU star Flau’jae Johnson carries bearded dragon into final NCAA Tournament run of college career
dailyNews.description: Flau’jae Johnson will take the floor in the NCAA Tournament for the final time Friday. Johnson, a college basketball national champion, reflected on her four-year career at LSU.

dailyNews.title: Former counterterrorism chief Joe Kent under FBI investigation for alleged classified leaks
dailyNews.description: FBI investigating former counterterror chief Joe Kent over alleged classified leak, sources tell Fox News Digital, with probe predating his abrupt resignation.

topStories.description: Senate Democrats plan multiple war powers resolutions to challenge President Trump's Iran military operations in a bid to force public testimony from top administration officials.

topStories.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the director of national intelligence, was left to square the president’s comments about an imminent nuclear threat from Iran with a letter from one of her trusted aides.

topStories.title: Mullin Signals He Would End Noem Policy That Slowed Disaster Aid
topStories.description: The president’s nominee, Markwayne Mullin, said he would avoid “micromanaging” FEMA.

topStories.title: Trump’s Planning for America’s 250th Emphasizes Religion’s Role in the Nation’s Founding
topStories.description: A closed-door White House event included news about the National Garden of American Heroes and an emphasis on the role of religion in the founding.

dailyNews.title: Following Trump, Republicans in Congress Propose to Ban Most Voting by Mail
dailyNews.description: A restrictive voter I.D. bill under consideration in the Senate could severely limit mail-in voting. Conservatives are pressing to end the practice outright, taking aim at an option that is widely used by voters.

dailyNews.title: Stratton, Illinois Senate Primary Winner, Promises a ‘Fight’ With Trump
dailyNews.description: Ms. Stratton, a Democrat whose viral campaign ad featured voters’ profane views of Mr. Trump, said her campaign’s aggressive messaging was resonating.

dailyNews.title: Silicon Valley Musters Behind-the-Scenes Support for Anthropic
dailyNews.description: Tech companies have been reluctant to directly confront Trump administration officials over their contract feud with the A.I. start-up.

dailyNews.title: Carol Kitman, 96, Dies; Photographer Documented the Vindman Twins
dailyNews.description: A chance encounter in Brooklyn led to a decades-long project following the boys’ lives, from childhood to national prominence as critics of President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to "blow up" huge Iranian gas field if Iran attacks Qatar
dailyNews.description: Trump says the U.S. will destroy a vast Iranian gas field if Tehran retaliates for an Israeli strike on the facility by attacking Qatar's infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: What to know about Joe Kent, Trump counterterrorism chief who resigned
dailyNews.description: In a resignation letter, Joe Kent said Iran "posed no imminent threat to our nation," and he asserted that "we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby."

dailyNews.title: 2/27: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Jeffrey Epstein ties spark investigations and resignations; New York City Mayor Mamdani and President Trump talk housing in second White House meeting.

dailyNews.title: 2/26: The Takeout: The Iran Question
dailyNews.description: In a special edition of "The Takeout," Major Garrett speaks with experts about escalating tensions over Iran's nuclear program and the potential political consequences of U.S. intervention as President Trump considers strikes if no deal is reached.

dailyNews.title: Senate votes down effort to restrict Trump's Iran war powers
dailyNews.description: The Senate defeated a war powers resolution on Wednesday that aimed to block President Trump from ramping up the war with Iran​, as the operation approaches a fourth week.

dailyNews.title: FBI conducting leak investigation into former Trump official who resigned over Iran war
dailyNews.description: A source told NBC News that the probe began before Joe Kent, a longtime Trump ally, announced his resignation as director of the National Counterterrorism Center.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices surge after attacks on energy sites
dailyNews.description: Oil prices surged after attacks on energy sites in Iran and Qatar. Plus, Trump administration officials were grilled by Democrats over air strikes against the Iranian regime. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.title: Chair Jerome Powell has 'no intention of leaving' the Fed until DOJ probe is closed
dailyNews.description: Fed Chair Jerome Powell says he will not step down from the central bank's board until an investigation launched by President Trump's Justice Dept. is closed.
